rationale: Educ. Code §12.019 governs the charter election process for home-rule school districts. It has no relation to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount and is unaffected by the proposed change.
quote: Sec. 12.019. CHARTER ELECTION. (a) As soon as practicable after approval of a home-rule school district charter under Section 12.018, the board of trustees of the district shall order an election on the proposed charter.
_note: No conflict identified; rule text concerns charter election procedures unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
